name: Rebecca (Reprint)
effect_text: [Blocker][On Play] Add up to 1 black Character card with a cost of 3 to 7 other than [Rebecca] from your trash to your hand. Then, play up to 1 black Character card with a cost of 3 or less from your hand rested.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the copyright information (Note: the original print did not include "EN" at the end of the copyright) and the Artist Credit (Note: there is no pencil design on top of the artist name).
